introSection: Bucklbahn is a steel kiddie semi-backwards roller coaster currently located at Eis Greissler Manufaktur in Krumbach, Lower Austria, Austria.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Dark purple track and green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble an engine. The last car faces backwards.

fullText:
Bucklbahn is a steel kiddie semi-backwards roller coaster currently located at Eis Greissler Manufaktur in Krumbach, Lower Austria, Austria.



Dark purple track and green supports.

The train is designed to resemble an engine. The last car faces backwards.
